Why Aoura Lenses

Built for Industrial Precision

Every lens engineered to withstand demanding welding environments while preserving perfect optical clarity.

🔬

Optical Grade Glass

Manufactured from premium optical-grade material with anti-reflection coating optimised for 1064nm infrared wavelength, ensuring minimal beam distortion and maximum clarity.

🔥

Heat Resistant

Engineered to withstand the thermal stress of continuous high-power welding operations. Stable performance even in demanding industrial workshop environments.

🎯

Universal Compatibility

Precision D18×2mm dimensions ensure secure fit with the majority of handheld fiber laser welding machines from 1000W to 3000W using standard 18mm lens housings.

🛡️

Spatter Protection

Acts as a sacrificial barrier protecting the expensive internal laser optics from welding spatter, metallic dust, fumes, and debris — dramatically extending welder lifespan.

💎

High Transmission

Maintains excellent laser beam transmission for accurate, stable welding performance. No compromise on power delivery or spot quality.

🔄

Easy Replacement

Simple tool-free installation and removal. Keep your welder running at peak performance with minimal downtime. Three lenses per pack for extended maintenance coverage.

Technical Specifications

Precision Engineered

Every dimension and coating specification of the Aoura D18×2mm lens is optimised for compatibility with 4-in-1 handheld fiber laser welding systems operating at 1064nm.

Replacing protective lenses regularly is the single most effective maintenance step to extend the operational lifespan of your laser head and maintain welding quality.

Common Questions

Frequently Asked

Everything you need to know about the Aoura Laser Protective Lens D18×2mm before ordering.

Chat on WhatsApp →
The D18×2mm lens is compatible with the vast majority of 4-in-1 handheld fiber laser welding machines from 1000W to 3000W that use a standard 18mm protective lens housing. If unsure, check your machine's lens compartment diameter — it should measure 18mm.
Replacement frequency depends on usage and material. For regular workshop use, inspect the lens after every session. Replace when you notice spatter buildup, scratches, or any degradation in weld quality. Having a spare pack on hand ensures no downtime.
Yes — free delivery to all seven UAE emirates: Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, Ajman, Ras Al Khaimah, Fujairah, and Umm Al Quwain. No minimum order required. Orders before 2pm Dubai time dispatch same business day.
You can order directly via WhatsApp at +971 52 150 3203 or email customer@aouragrp.com. Our team will confirm your order and provide delivery details. Payment options will be shared upon confirmation.
The Aoura protective lens is tested for compatibility with 1000W, 1500W, 2000W, and 3000W handheld fiber laser welding machines. It is specifically designed for 1064nm wavelength — the standard for Ytterbium fiber lasers used in welding.
Absolutely. We offer bulk pricing and wholesale options for workshops and distributors. Contact us on WhatsApp or email for volume pricing and availability.
